name: GOLD RESOURCE CORP
summary: Gold Resource Corporation (GORO) is a mining company focused on gold and other precious metals production. The company operates the Don David Gold Mine (DDGM) and is developing the Back Forty Project. Its business involves mining, processing, and production of gold and related commodities, with ongoing feasibility studies, engineering, permitting, and project financing activities.
